coordination_decisions_today.reason: Batch 6 LinkedIn pre-activation rules carried forward from Day 63. Two scenarios now active depending on batch_6_leads.json delivery.
key_rules: LinkedIn window opens Day 3 from Day-0 — DO NOT activate before Day 3
IMAP per lead mandatory before each LinkedIn connection request
If lead replied NOT_INTERESTED or UNSUBSCRIBE in email: block LinkedIn immediately
profiles.json MUST be written same session — one entry per lead, no batching
Archive trigger fires Day 7 from Day-0 EOD unconditionally if profiles.json missing
Note under 200 chars — hard limit. No mention of email campaign.
Max 1 connection note per lead. After connection accepted: wait 3-5 days, then ONE short value message (no pitch).
No LinkedIn on weekends or UK bank holidays
Ripon exclusion: verify any Ripon business is NOT Ripon Road Carpentry (lead 1) before sending
coordination_decisions_today.status: CONFIRMED — activate Day 3. Scenario A or B depending on Sunday delivery.

Weekend (today + Sunday) and Mon 2 + Tue 3 + Wed 4 are all available build days.
